speaker: speaker1
text: Excuse me , could you help me pick out a lotion ?

speaker: speaker1
text: I got poison oak while hiking , and I need something to help me with the itching .

speaker: speaker2
text: I can suggest a product called Techne that comes in a lotion or cream .

speaker: speaker2
text: Hikers tell me that the cream is best because it stays on longer .

speaker: speaker1
text: Is there anything else I can do to help with the itching ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Thank you so much for all of the information .

speaker: speaker2
text: You are welcome . Please feel free to ask me a question any time you need help .
